questions.text: Which of the following gases will be most non-ideal at - 10 deg * C ?
questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.explanation: Presence of electrons is large in sulphur dioxide and hence greater van der waals interactions . Due to greater intermolecular force it has high boiling point and requires high temperature to behave as ideally. Hence sulphur dioxide behave as least ideal gas at low temperature.
